message:
fix(orc): correct RLE V2 encoding and CLI crash on exit

- Fix DELTA encoding width_code=0 to mean constant delta (bit_width=0)
- Fix DIRECT/DELTA width code extraction to use bits 5-1 instead of 4-0
- Fix 9-bit length decoding (high bit from header, low 8 from next byte)
- Fix SELECT * crash for ORC/XLSX/Avro by not freeing stored column name slices

The RLE V2 encoding bugs caused integer and string columns to fail with
ColumnReadError. The CLI crash was caused by double-free when the executor
tried to free column names that were stored slices from the table, not
new allocations.
